fields.label: Eyebrow
fields.name: locations_overline
fields.instructions: Small overline above the heading, e.g. "Campus Locations".

fields.label: Heading
fields.name: locations_heading
fields.instructions: Section headline, e.g. "Where to find us".

fields.label: Map Embed URL
fields.name: locations_map_embed
fields.instructions: Paste a map embed URL (the src of a Google Maps or OpenStreetMap iframe). Overrides the pin below. Leave blank to use the map pin or show a placeholder.

fields.label: Map Pin (optional)
fields.name: locations_map
fields.instructions: Drop a pin to auto-generate a map embed when no Map Embed URL is set.

fields.label: Scrollable List
fields.name: locations_scroll
fields.instructions: Enable for 5–10+ locations. Constrains the card list to a scrollable column.

fields.label: Locations
fields.name: locations_cards
fields.instructions: One card per campus or center.

sub_fields.label: Street / Address
sub_fields.name: locations_cards_street
sub_fields.instructions: e.g. "757 W 800 S, Cedar City, UT 84720".
